summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comments, labels, closes, force pushes, and bypasses; no PR has a complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof. Four narrow PRs should remain in maintainer review lanes, while the broad XL hooks PR needs human scope review before any repair or merge path.

actions.reason: Narrow useful PR with passing evidence, but no complete merge preflight. Keep it open for maintainer review rather than recommending merge or repair.
